---
title: "Biomart obtain ort. genes"
author: "Josema"
date: "2025-02-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Install and load biomaRt
library(biomaRt)
library(tidyverse)

# Connect to Ensembl
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

# Define correct attributes (check the latest Ensembl names using listAttributes)
attributes <- c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", 
                "ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type", "ptroglodytes_homolog_ensembl_gene",
                "ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type", "ggorilla_homolog_ensembl_gene",
                "pabelii_homolog_orthology_type", "pabelii_homolog_ensembl_gene")

# Retrieve orthologs
orthologs <- getBM(attributes = attributes, mart = ensembl)

# Save to CSV
write.csv(orthologs, "/home/josema/Downloads/human_chimp_gorilla_orangutan_orthologs.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

# count & statistics 

```{r}

orthologs <- read.csv("/home/josema/Downloads/human_chimp_gorilla_orangutan_orthologs.csv")

orthologs[orthologs == ""] <- NA


# Human & pan only statistics
homa_pan_ort <- orthologs %>% 
  dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id,external_gene_name,ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(complete.cases(.)) %>% 
  rename(Class=ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type)

homa_pan_ort %>% 
  count(Class)


# Human, pan & gorilla  statistics
homa_pan_gor_ortorthologs <- orthologs %>% 
  dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id,external_gene_name,ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type, ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(complete.cases(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Class= case_when(ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type == 'ortholog_one2one' & ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_one2one' ~ 'ortholog_one2one',
                          ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type == 'ortholog_many2many' | ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_many2many' ~ 'ortholog_many2many',
                          TRUE ~ 'ortholog_one2many'
                          )) 

homa_pan_gor_ortorthologs %>% 
  count(Class)

# Human, pan , gorilla & pongo statistics

homa_pan_gor_pongo_ortorthologs <- orthologs %>% 
  dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id,external_gene_name,ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type, ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type,pabelii_homolog_orthology_type) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(complete.cases(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Class= case_when(ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type == 'ortholog_one2one' & ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_one2one' & pabelii_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_one2one' ~ 'ortholog_one2one',
                          ptroglodytes_homolog_orthology_type == 'ortholog_many2many' | ggorilla_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_many2many'| pabelii_homolog_orthology_type== 'ortholog_many2many' ~ 'ortholog_many2many',
                          TRUE ~ 'ortholog_one2many'
                          )) 

homa_pan_gor_pongo_ortorthologs%>% 
  count(Class)

```

# mirar los bHLH en que ortologos desaparecen

```{r}
bhlh <-  read.csv('/home/josema/Downloads/Tesis/factors_classification.csv') %>%  
  dplyr::select(X,Ledent2002.Simionato2007Name) %>% 
  rename(bHLH=X,
         Family=Ledent2002.Simionato2007Name)

bhlh_h_c <- homa_pan_ort %>% 
  filter(external_gene_name%in% bhlh$bHLH) %>% 
  dplyr::select(external_gene_name, Class)

bhlh_h_c_g <-homa_pan_gor_ortorthologs%>% 
  filter(external_gene_name%in% bhlh$bHLH)%>% 
  dplyr::select(external_gene_name, Class)

bhlh_h_c_g_p <-homa_pan_gor_pongo_ortorthologs%>% 
  filter(external_gene_name%in% bhlh$bHLH)%>% 
  dplyr::select(external_gene_name, Class)

plot_data_wide <- bhlh %>% 
  left_join(bhlh_h_c , by=c('bHLH'='external_gene_name')) %>% 
  left_join(bhlh_h_c_g , by=c('bHLH'='external_gene_name')) %>% 
  left_join(bhlh_h_c_g_p , by=c('bHLH'='external_gene_name')) %>% 
  rename(Chimp=Class.x,
         `Chimp+Gorilla`=Class.y,
         `Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo`=Class) 

plot_data <-plot_data_wide %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(bHLH,Family), names_to = 'Level', values_to = 'Orthology') %>% 
  mutate(Orthology = ifelse(is.na(Orthology), 'NA', Orthology)) %>% 
  ungroup()
```


```{r fig.height=17, fig.width=4}
plot <- plot_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Level, y = bHLH, fill = Orthology)) +
  geom_tile(color='gray90') +
  facet_grid(Family ~ .,
             scales = "free_y", 
             space = "free_y", 
             switch = "y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ortholog_one2one" = "#76C19E",  
                               "ortholog_one2many" = "#89DDC3",  
                               'NA' = "#DDDDDD"),
                    name = "Orthology",  # Legend title
                    breaks = c("ortholog_one2one", "ortholog_one2many", 'NA'),  
                    labels = c("One-to-One", "One-to-Many", "NA")) +  
    theme(strip.background = element_blank(),  
        strip.placement = "outside",  
        strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1),  
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),  
        axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),  
        legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),  
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),  
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9)) 

ggsave('/home/josema/Desktop/bhlh_ortholog.pdf', plot, device = 'pdf', height = 17, width = 4)
```


```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
plot_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Level, y = bHLH, fill = Orthology)) +
  geom_tile(color='white') +
  facet_wrap(~ Family,  # Use facet_wrap instead of facet_grid
             scales = "free_y", 
             ncol = 4,  # Create 2 columns
             strip.position = "left") +  # Keep facet labels on the left
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ortholog_one2one" = "#b08968",  
                               "ortholog_one2many" = "#ddb892",  
                               'NA' = "#f8edeb"),
                    name = "Orthology",  # Legend title
                    breaks = c("ortholog_one2one", "ortholog_one2many", 'NA'),  
                    labels = c("One-to-One", "One-to-Many", "NA"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(strip.background = element_blank(),  # Remove box around facet labels
        strip.placement = "outside",  # Place facet labels outside the axis
        strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1),  # Align facet labels
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # Optional: remove y-axis title
        axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"))  # Ensure y-axis text is readable

```

```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(networkD3)
library(ggalluvial)

# Step 1: Create a summary of counts of Orthology per Level
df_summary <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(Level, Orthology) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Step 2: Define the order of the levels and create the list of nodes (levels and orthologies)
levels_order <- c("Chimp", "Chimp+Gorilla", "Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo")

orthologies <- unique(df_summary$Orthology)

# Nodes will include both levels and orthology types
nodes <- data.frame(name = c(levels_order, orthologies))

# Step 3: Create links from levels to orthology types at each level
df_summary$LevelID <- match(df_summary$Level, nodes$name) - 1
df_summary$OrthologyID <- match(df_summary$Orthology, nodes$name) - 1

# Step 4: Create the links dataframe: transitions from levels to orthology types
links <- df_summary %>%
  select(LevelID, OrthologyID, count) %>%
  rename(source = LevelID, target = OrthologyID, value = count)

# Step 5: Create the Sankey diagram
sankey <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = links,
  Nodes = nodes,
  Source = "source",
  Target = "target",
  Value = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  units = "Protein Counts"
)

# Plot the Sankey diagram
sankey


```

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=4, warning=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)

# Step 2: Create the plot using ggalluvial
plot_data_wide %>% 
  replace(is.na(.), 'NA') %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~gsub('ortholog_','',.))) %>% 
ggplot(aes(axis1= Chimp, axis2= `Chimp+Gorilla`, axis3= `Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo`)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = `Chimp`)) +
  geom_stratum(aes(fill = `Chimp`), color='gray60') +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum))) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Chimp", "Chimp+Gorilla", "Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo"), expand = c(0.15, 0.15)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(title = "bHLH Orthology Transitions Across Levels",
       x = NULL, y = "Protein") +
  theme_void()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")


```

# orthology plot biomaRt

```{r}


full_plot_data_wide <- homa_pan_ort[,c('external_gene_name', 'Class')] %>% 
  left_join(homa_pan_gor_ortorthologs[,c('external_gene_name', 'Class')] , by='external_gene_name') %>% 
  left_join(homa_pan_gor_pongo_ortorthologs[,c('external_gene_name', 'Class')] , by='external_gene_name') %>% 
  rename(Chimp=Class.x,
         `Chimp+Gorilla`=Class.y,
         `Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo`=Class) 

full_plot_data_wide <- full_plot_data_wide %>% 
  replace(is.na(.), 'NA') %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~gsub('ortholog_','',.))) 


lodes_data <- full_plot_data_wide %>% count(Chimp, `Chimp+Gorilla`, `Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo`) %>%
  to_lodes_form(full_plot_data_wide, key = "axis", value = "value",
                            axes = c("Chimp", "Chimp+Gorilla", "Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo"))

ggplot(lodes_data, aes(x = axis, 
                       stratum = value,
                       alluvium = alluvium,
                       y = n,
                       label = value)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = value)) +  # Reduce alpha to speed up rendering
  geom_stratum(aes(fill = value), color = 'gray60') +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Chimp",
                              "Chimp+Gorilla",
                              "Chimp+Gorilla+Pongo"), 
                   expand = c(0.15, 0.15)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(title = "Protein Orthology Transitions Across Levels",
       x = NULL, y = "Protein") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```
